first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same in both evaluations. The model consistently flags the same skill gaps (lack of C++, industrial automation, and specific security standards) regardless of whether the candidate worked at smaller local companies or large, well-known international tech firms. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation.
